nuxtSiteConfig.name: Adam Billard's EPK
nuxtSiteConfig.description: Adam Billard is a young musician that started his career at 14 years old by writing his first song "I Don't Wanna Suffer Again" after a hard heartbreak with one of his best friends. He then continued learning guitar and writing songs to share everyone his thoughts and how he likes music.

about.title: About
about.content:
I originate from a city in Brittany, France. I started making music at 14 years old in a Pop style. From then my music style has enriched with influences from Rock, Pop-Rock and (you would have guessed it) Pop.
My music is a reflection of my thoughts and feelings, and I strive to create songs that resonate with listeners on a deep level. I am passionate about crafting melodies and lyrics that evoke emotions and tell stories, even ones I haven't lived.

simone-2026.title: Live at the Simone-Veil High School
simone-2026.description: I performed a live show with a few friends showcasing a few covers and original songs. Audience was really invested, clapping, participating, singing and dancing.

music-festival-2025.title: Music Festival in Liffré
music-festival-2025.description:
I had the opportunity to perform at a local music festival in Liffré with my band. We played a mix of original songs and rock covers, alongside some classics the people could sing to.
The crowd was amazing, singing along to our songs and dancing to the music. It was an unforgettable experience that fueled my passion for performing live.

music-festival-2026-liffre.title: Music Festival in Liffré
music-festival-2026-liffre.description: I had the opportunity to perform at a local music festival in Liffré again with my band, this time with all the members we needed. We played a few originals but mostly covers while keeping the music setlist from Pop to Rock, and the crowd loved it. TODO WRITE

music-festival-2026-erce.description: I had the opportunity to perform at a local music festival in Ercé-près-Liffré with my band. TODO
